message:
feat(keyboard): add hotkey conflict detection (s4qx.1.4)

Implement static ActionRegistry validation to detect duplicate shortcuts
and warn about browser-reserved key combinations.

Changes:
- Add validateConflicts.ts with validateHotkeyConflicts() function that:
  - Scans ActionRegistry for duplicate shortcuts in same scope
  - Flags global-global conflicts as errors
  - Warns when contextual actions may shadow global ones
  - Detects browser-reserved combos (Ctrl+W, Ctrl+T, etc.)
- Export validation utilities from keyboard/index.ts
- Integrate into KeyboardManager singleton (dev mode only)
- Add comprehensive test suite (13 tests, all passing)

Acceptance criteria met:
- Test fails if conflicting shortcut introduced
- Validation output identifies conflicting ActionIds
- Validator checks ActionRegistry (single source of truth)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
